title: rubus mongolicus
intro: Rubus mongolicus, also known as the Mongolian raspberry, is a type of shrub native to the mountainous regions of northern China and Mongolia. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which help to reduce swelling and protect cells from damage. The health benefits of Rubus mongolicus include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antiviral properties. Rubus mongolicus is typically prepared as a decoction or tea, and its extracts are also used in capsule or tablet form as a dietary supplement.
